metadata_allowed_keys.description: Allowlist of metadata keys users can set.
metadata_allowed_keys.title: Allowed metadata keys

default_ttl_minutes.description: Default bearer token TTL in minutes.
default_ttl_minutes.title: Default TTL

opaque_token_length.description: Length of opaque bearer tokens in bytes.
opaque_token_length.title: Token length

master_key.description: Master encryption key. Use env:VAR or file:/path reference.
master_key.title: Master key

audit_log_days.description: Days to retain audit logs (~7 years = 2555).
audit_log_days.title: Audit log retention

deleted_user_anonymize_after_days.description: Days after deletion to anonymize user data (0 = immediate).
deleted_user_anonymize_after_days.title: Anonymize after

guest_ttl_days.description: Days before expired guests are purged.
guest_ttl_days.title: Guest TTL

encryption_key.description: Key for encrypting sensitive columns. Use env:VAR or file:/path references.
encryption_key.title: Encryption key

anonymize_email_pattern.description: Pattern for anonymized emails. Use {hash} as placeholder.
anonymize_email_pattern.title: Anonymize pattern

preserve_referential_integrity.description: Keep anonymized records for referential integrity.
preserve_referential_integrity.title: Preserve referential integrity

password_reset_token_ttl_minutes.description: How long password reset tokens remain valid.
password_reset_token_ttl_minutes.title: Password reset token TTL (minutes)

verification_token_ttl_hours.description: How long email verification tokens remain valid.
verification_token_ttl_hours.title: Verification token TTL (hours)

allowed_cidrs.description: Network ranges allowed for internal API access.
allowed_cidrs.title: Allowed CIDRs

api_token.description: Static token for service-to-service auth. Use env:VAR reference.
api_token.title: API token

private_key.description: Path or reference to JWT private key.
private_key.title: Private key

public_key.description: Path or reference to JWT public key.
public_key.title: Public key

require_lowercase.description: Require at least one lowercase letter.
require_lowercase.title: Require lowercase

require_uppercase.description: Require at least one uppercase letter.
require_uppercase.title: Require uppercase

requests_per_minute.description: Maximum requests per minute per client.
requests_per_minute.title: Requests per minute

count.description: Number of recovery codes to generate.
count.title: Count

enabled.description: Enable Redis for caching and rate limiting.
enabled.title: Enabled

host.description: IP address to bind the server to.
host.title: Bind host

public_url.description: External URL for this server (used for redirects, CORS, etc.).
public_url.title: Public URL

tls_key.description: Path to TLS private key file.
tls_key.title: TLS private key

secret.description: Secret key for signing session tokens. Use env:VAR reference.
secret.title: Session secret

password.description: SMTP authentication password. Use env:VAR reference.
password.title: Password

issuer.description: TOTP issuer name shown in authenticator apps.
issuer.title: Issuer

events.description: List of event types to subscribe to.
events.title: Events

retry_max_attempts.description: Maximum retry attempts for failed deliveries.
retry_max_attempts.title: Max retries

secret.description: Secret for webhook payload signing. Use env:VAR reference.
secret.title: Signing secret
